Quest Items for Waging War

Essence Element of Tecton
(Tec)
|
Pm the Quake Keeper (cost is 999 runes) from any location |
Stand in YOUR KD containing 999 runes and trade the Quake Keeper a rusty dagger (use /add Quake Keeper to get him on your trade list). You lose the runes, and get the Tecton.

To use the tecton, move to the kingdom where you want to do severe damage (not your own kingdom) and while there trade the tecton to the Quake Keeper.

The location where you are at that time will suffer immediate damage, and for the rest of the current game hour (type /t to see the time) your armys attacks in any kingdom will do 25x more damage than normal (aftershock).

Dropping a Tecton also gives you a chance to find a sleeved poker card, which can be used to help with dueling. You can get a card even if you drop the Tecton on an NPC kingdom, like the Pub or one of the Keeps, where you run no risk of an irate player retaliating on your kingdoms.

Reduces cannons, walls, and moats to rubble. Does massive random damage to catapults, soldiers, archers, trebuchets, food, population, and runes.

Morale is not damaged by Quakes.

While under the influence of a Tecton you cannot accept kingdoms from another player or give them to anyone other then "NOBODY", which makes them available for settling (thanks to Ramza, Orden and Red193193 for that tip).

Alundra Mischef on S2 shared an interesting tip. The hourly actions limit (6,000/hr) is reset by dropping a Tecton so it is a way to perform more actions in an hour. A little extreme, but interesting game behavior.
|

Essence Element of Greater Tecton

Thanks to Obsidian Night on S1 for clarifying the details for this item.

(The July 24, 2022 /ann has the first announcement about this essence.)

Cannot be used in the Forge plane
|
The cost is 10 "regular" Tectons

(so equivalent to 10 trillion gold) |
Create 10 Tectons with runes in your own kingdoms (use /add Quake Keeper to get him on your trade list) and then trade 1 Tecton to the Quake Keeper. You will lose the 10 Tectons and get 1 Greater Tecton in return ("You find a Essence Element of Greater Tecton"). You also get a pm "Quake Keeper: Simply hand it back when standing in the plane of your choice to activate" .

To use the Greater Tecton, move to the plane where you want to cause damage and trade it to the Quake Keeper. It will then damage some random location on that plane, removing the king, Trs, runes, pop and armies and lowering morale to 0%. The food and forts are not affected. You will be automatically teleported to that location and can settle it. The (now former) king will get a pm alert about the attack "Quake Keeper: Your kingdom at x,y,z was sucked into the void" (courtesy of
Messier on S1) and a system-wide announcement (yellow text) will show "Someone causes a random kingdom to be consumed by the void" . The specific location will not be announced.

When using a Greater Tecton there is very small chance you might find a DD relic . There is a system message when this happens "Someone found a powerful relic in the cracked earth!!!" (thanks to Logi on S2 for that information). Also, Grunkin (S1) pointed out that Greater Tectons do trigger aftershock for the remaining hour like a regular Tecton (see /ann for 7/24/2022).

|

Essence Element of Stone
(Stone)
|
Pm the Quake Keeper (cost is 999 runes) from any location |
Stand in YOUR KD containing 999 runes and trade the Quake Keeper an old knife (use /add Quake Keeper to get him on your trade list). You lose the runes, and get the Stone.

To use the stone trade it to the Quake Keeper and all your kingdoms will gain extra protection against attack for the rest of the current game hour (type /t to see the time). I'm not certain whether you need to be in one of your own kingdoms when trading the stone or if any location will still key it to your protection, so be in your own kingdom at the time to be sure.

Vastly increases the defense of all your Kingdoms for the remainder of the game hour. The Stone is the defensive answer to a Tecton

While under the influence of a Stone you cannot accept kingdoms from another player or give them to anyone other then "NOBODY", which makes them available for settling (thanks to Ramza, Orden and Red193193 for that tip).

3/17/2005 Announcement:

The sash greatly increases the power of the attack bonuses gained from sleeved black cards and also allows you to gain an Ambush ability from any sleeved red card. The Ambush ability when activated gives you a 50 percent chance of ambushing someone who attacks you, causing their attack to be useless (their relics don’t fire and they can’t attack) and still allowing you to perform your counter attack as always. Note that you only leave Ambush mode after it has once successfully fired, guaranteeing some usage out of every sleeved red card. Having the sash also allows your Devastating Blow, Crippling Blow, Mana Rush, and Mana Surge to work on beasts.

Quote A Citizen: Think you’re luckier than me? Well give me an EEoGT and I’ll roll my 20 sided die, if it rolls a 10 you can have my sash.

Transcendental Sanction (access to all planes). Prerequisites – Mountain Tamer and Lava Splicer

Sanction of Serenity
(SoSe) ( Prerequisites : 1. Sanction of Surpassment, 2. Skill Potencifier, 3. Harbingers Scepter of Delegation, 4. Goblin Hide Backpack, 5. Fangs of the Bloodletter, 6. Beast Bane

Sanction of Serenity (SoSe) |
Obtained from the Rune Keeper

Required to access The Forge plane (entrance at 141,Hel,146 then move down) |
If you have the 6 prerequisite items and 50,000 ash, you trade your SoS to the Rune Keeper and he converts them all into an SoSe. Players with a Quickness (/q ability) only need 30k ash.

Combines the power of 6 quest items into one with other major benefits:

- 50% chance of being revived (stacks with ToTF).

- Haste improvement for arrows better than DT is greatly increased.

- Grandmaster Bowmen get an additional 10% mez and void resistance, plus dodge ability that is as effective as equipping two shields but only works against melee attacks.

- Magicians, Master Magicians, Armsmen and Master of Arms have a 75% chance of a double attack with their single spell or weapon in addition to their normal bonuses.

- Bloodletters get the 10x FotB bonus PLUS an additional 10x (100x total) damage to beasts and have a 10% mez and void resistance.

- Theurgal Diviniators get an extra 50% chance of a double cast, a 5x damage bonus, and 10% mez and void resistance.

- Masters of Fists receive an additional 10% mez and void resistance as well as the same dodge ability as Grandmaster Bowmen.

- Required for access to The Forge

|

Tracking Quests You can find a much fuller explanation of these quests on this reddit post.

Goldblum Goo

Completing this quest costs either 5,000+ ash or 999 runes and some minor ash. |
Obtained by killing a Nightmare Fly beast |
After getting the Goo trade it to the Shrine Keeper, from your kingdom with 999 runes if you want to pay that way, and he will give you a clue about which kingdom you must enter and kill any random enemy. Every 5 minutes you can message the Keeper with "track" and for 10 ash you'll get a clue where the target kingdom is relative to your current location. The process can get tedious.

When you eventually find the right kingdom and kill something there you complete the quest and your stats will include a chance to not consume a black sleeved card when you trigger one before fighting. The quest is repeatable and the bonus keeps stacking. You can see it in your /stats output. |

Deformed Wing

Completing this quest costs either 5,000+ ash or 999 runes and some minor ash. |
Obtained by killing a Dragonling Zombie beast |
After getting the Wing trade it to the Shrine Keeper, from your kingdom with 999 runes if you want to pay that way, and he will give you a clue about which kingdom you must enter and kill any random enemy. Every 5 minutes you can message the Keeper with "track" and for 10 ash you'll get a clue where the target kingdom is relative to your current location. The process can get tedious.

When you eventually find the right kingdom and kill something there you complete the quest and your stats will include a chance to not consume a red sleeved card when you trigger one before fighting. The quest is repeatable and the bonus keeps stacking. You can see it in your /stats output. |
|

Master of Class Quests were added on 1 June 2018. These quests require access to the Forge plane is required so it is necessary to first have a Sanction of Serenity to do them.
I have only done the Vampire's Shade quest but I have chatted with the Forge Hermit and thanks to a tip from Tris on S1 I believe the instructions below are correct.

The description for these quests was a little confusing to me but Randall Flagg on S2 helped sort it out. When he tried to get the Fighter's Gambeson while showing as an Armsman, not a Master, the Hermit refused to take his gold or ash and gave the response "Only the best fighters, casters, and vampires need apply". Same when he equipped as a Berserker, but not a Master. After adjusting his stats to show as a Master Berserker or Master At Arms he was able to complete the quest for the Gambeson. He then shifted his stats away from what is needed to be a Master Berserker but with the Gambeson he still showed as one.

So, it seems these items do not help you initially qualify as a Master of class with a stat distribution that is different from normal, but they do allow you to retain that status even after moving some stats away from the initial requirements. I'm quessing that characters with much more accuracy than they need to hit everything will use these quests to shift more points towards damage (or maybe evasion) while keeping their status as Masters.

The Vampire, Fighter and Caster items each cost 25,000 ash.
The Theurgist and Monk Staffs cost 2 DaD or DaDev relics each!

An interesting observation came from Mordred on S1. He found that without getting the Warder or Squire he was able to jump those quests and get a Fighter's Gambeson once he shifted enough stats to show as a Master of Class.

Fighter's Gambeson
Costs 25,000 ash |
Go to 24,For,32 and chat with the Forge Hermit |
1. Equip as a fighter
2. Use /st to confirm the server sees you as a master fighter and not as any other class.
3. Give the hermit 25 gold, he will take 25,000 ash, and you will get a Fighter's Gambeson.

Removes stat requirements to be Master Berserker or Master of Arms(?). Gives Master Berserkers and Master of Arms a 20% chance to negate any kind of vampire's void or devoid resist with a stake through the heart. |

Caster's Robes
Costs 25,000 ash |
Go to 24,For,32 and chat with the Forge Hermit
|
1. Equip as a caster
2. Use /st to confirm the server sees you as a master caster and not as any other class.
3. Give the hermit 25 gold, he will take 25,000 ash, and you will get a Caster's Robes.

Removes stat requirements to be Master Wizard or Master Magician. Gives Master Wizards and Master Magicians a 50% chance to burn their enemy's arrows mid-flight. |

Vampire's Shade
Costs 25,000 ash |
Go to 24,For,32 and chat with the Forge Hermit |
1. Equip as a vampire
2. Use /st to confirm the server sees you as a master vampire and not as any other class.
3. Give the hermit 25 gold, he will take 25,000 ash, and you will get a Vampire's Shade.

Removes stat requirements to be Bloodletter. Gives Bloodletters a 10% chance to resist their enemy's voids and devoids. |

Theurgist's Staff of Domination
Costs two DaDev relics.

Thanks to Eyemredy09 on S2 for clarifying that you can not use plain DaD's, only DaDevoids will work as for the Monk's Staff below. Trying to use DaD relics prompted the reply Forge Hermit: "Hmmm, ya. That`s a DaD, but I think I`d prefer a better one. Two, actually." |
Go to 24,For,32 and chat with the Forge Hermit |
1. Equip as a theurgist
2. Use /st to confirm the server sees you as a theurgist and not as any other class. I thought it required being a Master of the Arcane but Mydnitetoker on S2 (thanks for sharing) was able to get the staff when he showed as a Theurgal Divinator.
3. Give the hermit a pure DaDev relic then he will take another, and you will get a Theurgist's Staff of Domination.

Gives Theurgal Divinators the effects of having two extra DLDev relics equipped and increases their damage bonus gained from Shadows from 1.7x to 2.2x and a 50% chance to burn their enemy's arrows mid-flight.

If you get this item and then decide you do not want it the hermit will can remove it and give a refund of your relics but that refund will cost (presumably) 50,000 ash. Thanks to Evincarvolrath for reminding me about the refund option and providing the ash cost. |

Friar's Staff of Preeminence
(For Monks)
Costs two DaDev relics

Seiyakou clarified that only DaDevoids work for getting the Staff. The hermit will not accept plain DaD relics as seen in his comments if you try to use them:

When attempting to trade a DaD - “Forge Hermit: Hmmm, ya. That's a DaD, but I think I'd prefer a better one. Two, actually.”

When trading a DaDev but the second relic is only a DaD - “Forge Hermit: That's funny. I don't see two of them.” |
Go to 24,For,32 and chat with the Forge Hermit
|
1. Equip as a monk
2. Use /st to confirm the server sees you as a master monk and not as any other class.
3. Give the hermit a pure DaDev relic then he will take another, and you will get a Friar's Staff of Preeminence.

Gives Master of Fists the effects of having an extra DaDev relic equipped and allows them to put arrows in their hands to take advantage of effects such as Shadow bonuses and relics. Also provides 50% chance of pummeling an enemy, preventing their attack.

If you get this item and then decide you do not want it the hermit will can remove it and give a refund of your relics but that refund will cost 50,000 ash. Thanks to Evincarvolrath for reminding me about the refund option and providing the ash cost. |

Two Convenience Items Were added on 1 July 2018. Both are only available for cash, not as random drops or through using ash.
While just buying something is not realy a "quest" these will appear in your inventory under "Others" with all the other quest items.

The Descender |
Allows those who ALREADY HAVE SoSe to travel to the Forge from any Hell location instead of always using 141,Hel,146 as their access point. |
Purchase directly from Glitchless for $25

Remember, you must already have SoSe to make use of this item. |

The Expander |
Increases your inventory space by an additional 75 slots, but also takes up one slot itself giving a maximum capacity of 164 (thanks to Anubis for confirming that factoid). Only one Expander can be had on a character. |
Purchase directly from Glitchless for $75 |

Innate Class Resists (These stack with all quest items and relics)

The Master Bowman class now receives an additional 10% resistance to voidance.

The Grandmaster Bowman class now recieves an additional 20% resistance to voidance.

The Armsman class now recieves an additional 10% resistance to voidance.

The Master of Arms class now recieves an additional 20% resistance to voidance.

The Berserker class now receives an additional 5% resistance to voidance.

The Master Berserker class now receives an additional 10% resistance to voidance.

The Magician class now recieves an additional 5% resistance to voidance.

The Master Magician class now recieves an additional 10% resistance to voidance.

The Wizard class now receives an additional 3% resistance to voidance.

The Master Wizard class now receives an additional 5% resistance to voidance.

The Blood Tyrant and Bloodletter class now receives an additional 3% resistance to voidance.

The Master of Fists class now receives an additional 5% resistance to mesmerization.

The Armsman class now recieves an additional 10% resistance to mesmerization.

The Master of Arms class now recieves an additional 20% resistance to mesmerization.

The Berserker class now receives an additional 5% resistance to mesmerization.

The Master Berserker class now receives an additional 10% resistance to mesmerization.

The Magician class now recieves an additional 5% resistance to mesmerization.

The Master Magician class now recieves an additional 10% resistance to mesmerization.

The Wizard class now receives an additional 3% resistance to mesmerization.

The Master Wizard class now receives an additional 5% resistance to mesmerization.

* The only way to get your fists to a power greater than a Mace of Resurrection is through pure skill training, special quest items lack the power.

When in Sky, you get DOUBLE the amount of experience. Which means you level twice as fast as on the surface.

When in Dungeon, you get DOUBLE the amount of gold per creature you kill.

When in Heaven, you get TRIPLE the amount of gold per creature you kill.

When in Hell, you get TRIPLE the amount of experience.

Return to home

The opinions expressed on this site are my own and are not endorsed by Glitchless Software nor do they necessarily reflect the opinions of Glitchless or any of its employees.

If you are new to RWK and find this site sufficiently helpful to warrant it, you can say "thanks" by typing the command "/mentor Jimcav" (without the quotes") at any point from levels 1 through 5. It will cost you nothing but my character will receive 500 ash for helping you as a guide. This action will also trigger a humorous system message .

This page was last updated 7 August 2025

If you see my content on other sites keep in mind it is pirated material being used without attribution or permission and in violation of my copyright. It is dishonest and unethical behavior. Keep this in mind if you deal with those folks in the game.

Keyword Search:

index

sitemap

advanced

Search engine by freefind.com

7 August 2025

Niizandar/Sarenrae and Obsidian Night/Cagedangel put together a comprehensive guide to The Forge plane and generously shared it here .

7 September 2024

Mav73 has added the same historical information described below for Server 2. Thanks again Mav!

(server 2 results are here .

31 August 2024

Mav73 pored through the Acumen Inquest results in /ann and created a comprehensive table showing all the results for Server 1. It's an impressive amount of work and he's willing to share it with the RWK community via Google Docs. Thank You Mav73!

You can access these historical data for Server 1 here .

3 August 2023

It looks like the report of Super relics no longer dropping was a misunderstanding. Yesterday Shambi on S1 had a VS drop in the Shrine. It was good to learn that Super drops are still possible, although very, very rare.

14 July 2023

Super relics used to be very, very rare drops, but they could be found occasionally by killing normal enemies. In the early years I found several and at some point did a rough estimate that they seemed to drop after something like 65,000 kills. The frequency appeared to decrease over time, which makes sense as features like hotkeys made it possible to kill critters more quickly. Now they are completely elimated from the game as random drops. Vamonaru on S2 shared that he obtained that information in emails with Glitchless. It's sad news. Even thouigh supers were always very rare drops the hope of finding one made RWK a little bit more fun. They can still be purchased from Glitchless for $50 or obtained from the Puddle Keeper by sacrificing a DD relic.

25 June 2023

Rouxgaroux on S1 shared an interesting piece of information. I knew that certain special drops, like quest items and demo or better equipment from beast kills, are exempt from the inventory maximum but never knew the details.
He explained there is a hard inventory maximum of 500 total items even for these special drops.

For example, a player with a Goblin Hide Backpack can hold 90 items obtained through crafting, trades or as normal drops.
If you reach this cap you cannot accept more items in trade, or craft more, and any additional normal drops from kills will not actually be added to your inventory. However, if you then get a no-trade, no-destroy quest drop it will still
be added to your inventory even though it's full. The same is true for things like demo, earthen or crystal drops off beasts. Something I did not know is that the exclusion also applies to gems.

Someone apparently kept collecting these items, I'd guess mostly gems, until reaching an absolute inventory limit of 500. Beyond that the game will not add any more items to your character. Thank you Rouxgaroux for that update.

24 July 2022

A new item for waging war was added to the game, the Essence Element of Greater Tecton. It basically expells the king from some random kingdom on whichever plane it is activated (except the Forge).
Obsidian Night was good enough to share the details. When activated, this Great Tecton removes the king, drives morale to 0% and teleports the attacker to that location, but does not harm armies, forts, food, runes or Trs so
the player using the Great Tec can then immediately settle a potentially very strong kingdom. I've updated my quests page with what I've learned so far.
This is a new item so there may be some adjustments to its operation made over the next few days.

9 Sept 2021

Happy 20th Birthday RWK! The current version of the game started on 9 Sept 2001 and has kept running ever since. That's a pretty good record for any game.

Looks like no changes are being added to celebrate the event, so I guess that's it. Back to clicking, folks.

24 July 2021

I updated a couple of pages with new information donated by other players. Obsidian Night extended the data on arrow attack delay vs arrow quality and that page now includes data on the speed of Shadow Scale and Forged arrows. Thank you Obsidian for sharing your results with the other players.

I also updated my quests page with a correction on how to obtain the Friar's Staff of Preeminence . Seiyakou found that only DaDevoids will work, the Hermit will not accept plain DaD's. Thank you Seiyakou for the update. Now I wonder if the same restriction applies to the Theurgist's Staff of Domination .
17 June 2021

Seiyakou on S2 very generously shared data he collected while repeating the tracking quests which show the /st value for "Free (Red or Black) Card" approachs but never actually reaches a maximum of 60% even after repeating the quest 20 times. I would say there is little point in doing it more than 10 times seeing how the increases are so small after that point. I added a Free Cards page showing his observations.

3 March 2021

Updated the table below to include the 9th Forged item, information courtesy of Peutre (S1).

1 January 2021

Happy New Year Everyone! Let us hope 2021 is much better than 2020. A notable milestone for RWK will be the 20th anniversary of this version on September 9.

Peutre messaged me additional details about crafting Forged items and I added them to the table below.Thank you again.

17 December 2020

Peutre (S1) was good enough to share details about the requirements for successive Forged items, up to the seventh item. Thank you for the information.

Item Number | Great Gems Needed | Trs Gold Consumed | Forging Time (days) |

1st | 5 | 10,000,000 | 5 |

2nd | 10 | 20,000,000 | 10 |

3rd | 15 | 28,000,000 | 15 |

4th | 20 | 39,000,000 | 20 |

5th | 25 | 54,800,000 | 25 |

6th | 30 | 76,832,000 | 30 |

7th | 35 | 107,564,800 | 35 |

8th | 40 | 150,590,720 | 40 |

9th | 45 | 210,827,008 | 45 |

10th | 50 | 295,157,811 | 50 |

27 March 2020

Chesty Puller was good enough to point out a change on 18 March 2020 to settle Forge kingdoms with less clicking (see /ann). If you visit the Forge Hermit at 024,For,032 and pm "settle" you get a short dialog from him; "Ya, toss me some treasures if you want to try and settle here faster." Move to the location you want to settle and trade treasure elements to the Hermit for your attempts. An EEoT=25 chances to settle, EEoGT=125, EEoST=500. When the attempt fails the Hermit pm's you "Sucks to be you, haha!" and "*deep breath* No.No.No.No.No.No.No.No.No.No.No.No.No.No.No.No.No.No.No.No.No.No.No.No.No." for an EEoT. That's 25 No's. When your attempt succeeds you get a "Yes" and the kingdom is yours. While this update is a time saver something to keep in mind is that the treasure is the entirely consumed regardless of how many attempts fail. Kingrico on S1 shared that when he used an EEoST to settle a kingdom and it took less than 25 tries to succeed (less than 50 billion gold) but the entire treasure was still lost in the process.

28 April 2019

I corrected a mistake regarding use of the Leather of Delegation I had on the embezzlement calculator page. I did not realize an LoD can no longer be used to embezzle for other characters. Thanks to Lord Asrock on S1 for pointing that out to me.

23 April 2019

I added some instructions for how to embezzle using the Harbingers Scepter of Delegation and a Leather of Delegation to the embezzlement calculator page.

9 April 2019

Rouxgaroux from S1 sent me an embezzlement calculator to add to the site. Fill in the fields and it will calculate the optimum amount to embezzle for your Trs to fully recover over a given time span. It's a page from when he had his own RWK site and looks like it predates the Forge since interest boosts for kingdoms there are not included.

10 March 2019

Evincarvolrath (S1) shared information on the stat boosts from some Forged items. Presumably these attributes are on top of their Shadow Scale properties. The Mantle gives 15% to both Crippling and Cripple Resist, the shield the same plus 10% Damage Mitigation.

Seith has noticed that Forge kingdoms do not give more interest with higher Kingmanship skill. He received the same amount of interest with characters having 99 and 125 skill levels.

6 March 2019

Evincarvolrath (S1) was good enough to send me an update on the new Forge items. The first item costs 10 mil Forge Trs gold (10 Trillion normal gold), 5 Great Gems, a Shadow item, and takes 5 days to make. The second item costs 20 mil Forge Trs, 10 Great Gems and takes 10 days, third is 30 mil Forge Trs, 15 Great Gems and takes 15 days. So the pattern is that each additional item costs 10 mil more Forge Trs, 5 more Gems and takes 5 days longer than its predecessor.

27 February 2019

I worked up weapon crafting skills on S2 and periodically checked whether I could attempt a Heavy Forge Talon. Hazonko saw the message change from insufficient skill to insufficient gems between 750 and 765. I saw the same change going from 764 to 765 so I'm pretty sure 765 is the skill needed to attempt. I'd like to know if anyone finds Forged items can fail. That would be a lot of lost gems. Another question is when non-special Forged items become available. Looking at other items my guess is 395 but it is just supposition at this point.

26 February 2019

There seems to be some uncertainty about how high a skill is required to make Forge Crafted items. Hazonko got the crafting message at a skill of 765 that implies it's possible and thought the skill needed to attempt is somewhere between 750 and 765 and not 785, as previously reported. I am working on skills on S2 and spent some time on weapons after getting Hazonko's pm. Right now a Heavy Forge Talon is still not possible to attempt at a Weaponcrafting skill of 760 so it's looking like 765 may be where Forged items start being possible to attempt. I do not know if they ever fail.

23 February 2019

New Forged items have been added to the game, see the 2/22/19 announcement. They can only be crafted in the Forge and require a Shadow Scale item to upgrade. They work like gem upgrades to Dragon Elements, where first Special (Light, Rapid, Dur, etc.) consumes 10 million gold and 5 Great Gem Essence Elements, then the next consumes 10 Great Gems, and so on (courtesy of Anubis). The minimum skills needed to attempt are not certain yet and I don't have any numbers for the stat boosts or the cost of normal Forged items, although only the heal spell is likely to be of any interest.

The Actions menu also has a new entry: "If an item name and a number appear in a location, it means that the kingdom is currently being used to forge a powerful item. The number shown is the amount of hours left to complete the forging. During this time, the kingdom does not produce any interest or gems. If overthrown the item will be destroyed." The Forged item name and time appear in a new entry to the Kingdom section of the user interface.

9 October 2018

Today several players on Server 2 coordinated making a string of beast summoning attempts to get an idea of what the odds for success really are when taking that route. After 46 attempts a total of 22 beasts had spawned, for an overall success rate of 48%. As is often the case for random processes the successes were not evenly distributed throughout the study. The first 10 attempts all failed but as the string continued there were enough successes to give a much more favorable end result. Those public attempts each cost 1,000 ash while guaranteed public spawns use 2,250. If the long-term success rates for both methods converge to the same value you'd expect the attempts to average a 44% success rate over time, which is close to what was seen in today's experiment. I only kept the count so thanks go to all those who spent their hard-earned ash collecting data to share with the larger RWK community.

10 September 2018

First, I'd like to wish RWK a happy 17th birthday, which occurred yesterday. In another year the game can legally vote :)

Secondly, a player pointed out to me that monks can equip arrows and still be recognized as monks by the server provided they complete the Friar's Staff of Preeminence quest. This feature gives them a route for equipping the full compliment of 16 relics, plus they get any item stat bonuses for arrows of a given quality. So, adding 2 Shadow Scale arrows to a monk's kit would add 2 additional relics compared to playing with empty hands, plus there is a 100% Dur boost and other benefits from each arrow because they're Shadow Scale. There was no change to the delay bar with arrow quality and the arrows themselves do not appear to add any damage, although the relics they carry and their innate stat effects may add to damage. I had missed noticing this benefit in the description of the Staff quest but it's something good to know so I added it to my character creation page . Unfortunately, monks who do not get the Friar's Staff are stuck using empty hands and being 2 relics short of a full load.

31 August 2018

I added data for Stallion's Pub to my drop rates page and they show basically the same values as the Puddle, which has been assumed for years. I also corrected some values in the tables. My spreadsheet formulas had drifted from where they should have been so some average numbers were off. I also had been wondering if super relics still can drop and the question was answered when I found one on S2. They are very rare but still can randomly drop off normal enemies.

14 August 2018

I have been collecting more data on drop frequency in different locations and updated my drop rates page . The old conclusions are still valid but I started confirming some of the assumptions I made previously and am trying to quantify some of the differences that players qualitatively know to exist. I'm also modifying the presentation to make the results easier to follow. I'm leaning towards removing the raw drop and kill numbers to make it less cluttered but for now I have included all the data.

8 August 2018

I've been cleaning up my pages and updating them, usually minor changes, as I notice mistakes or outdated information. However, I did make a major update to the Arrow speed vs quality page with some very interesting data Spacta collected and was good enough to share. He has a cleaner way than I used to see how the action delay changes with increasing arrow quality and showed that at the top, using Crystal or Shadow Scale arrows, SoSe archers should be the fastest class in the game. I think it is pretty cool stuff :)

13 July 2018

Randall Flagg confirmed that after he adjusted stats to qualify as a Master Berserker he was able to complete the Fighter's Gambeson quest . With the Gambeson he still showed as a Master even after shifting his stats off the triggering values. It looks like "Removes stat requirements to be Master..." on the official help site means you can still retain your "Master" status and benefits after shifting stats away from what got you there initially, but you must first attain Master status to complete the quest. This feature is handy for characters who have more points than they need in a stat that qualified them as a Master of class but with their quests, relics or gear are not required for them to kill everything they want.

7 July 2018

The master of class quests seem to be a little more confusing than I thought from the descriptions on the official help site . The part about "Removes stat requirements to be Master..." seemed to mean that anyone can get the quest items and would then show as a master of class despite the character's stat distribution. However, when Randall Flagg on S2 was equipped as a non-Master Armsman or Berserker and tried for the Fighter's Gambeson the Hermit didn't take his ash and replied with "Only the best fighters, casters, and vampires need apply". That looks like you must already be a master of your class to get the quest item.

2 July 2018

I added the two new purchase-only convenience items to the Quests page. The Quick Links table items have also been rearranged into alphabetical order

26 June 2018

I was asked to post some information about the Acumen Inquest for new players so I added a new page about it on this site. It is not intended for experienced players, it's just a short introduction with very basic information for new ones.

24 June 2018

I updated my Quests page after Tris pointed out I had the wrong information for the new Monk and Theurg quest items . I also chatted more with the Forge Hermit and added a new page with the dialog I've gotten out of it so far. official help site.

23 June 2018

I updated my Quests page to include the new master of class items. The page still needs some formatting and links added but I wanted to put it up for anyone who has not already gotten the information, most of which is on the official help site.

23 May 2018

I want to thank Anubis, Ribjr, Mrjackdaniels and Empyron on S2 for helping me use a DDD to complete the SoSe quest and get a VS upgraded to VAS.

Also thanks to Spacta for sharing some very interesting data on attack delay vs arrow quality. I'll be updating my page on it in a couple of weeks after I get back from a trip out of town.

1 January 2018

Happy New Year RWK! Here's wishing good drops to everyone in 2018.

I've been slowly cleaning up the code on my pages to make them more efficient and hopefully display better. I'm not a programmer so it's a lot of trial and error (lots of errors) but still fun to learn more about how the sausage is made. If I end up creating errors I trust visitors will let me know so I can fix them.

11 October 2017

The old freefind link was no longer working so I updated that and now the site is searchable again.

6 September 2017

A good explanation of the new beasts and their associated quests was provided by Lord Watzhisname and is posted on reddit .

Celtic Mercenary on Server 2 pointed out that someone starting a mule could reduce the time to reach level 10 using a Sur kingdom. Settle the kingdom with a higher level character, add 2 runes, give the kingdom to the mule. It can then /na the runes to get 2 bil gold and buy a Death Spike to begin leveling as the max rate. This approach eliminates the time required killing low gold and experience critters for cheap relics until damage is high enough to level with the fewest kills.

10 August 2017

Random private Dragon Eaters can now be summoned for 1,999,999,993 gold and 30,000 ash. Perhaps that is why the maximum ash a character can hold has been raised to 500,000.

16 July 2017

Not exactly breaking news at this point but a new plane, The Forge, was added June 30. The entrance is likely common knowledge but for anyone who does not already know you move down from 141,Hel,146 and you need the Sanction of Serenity to enter. Kingdoms work a little differently than other planes and the details are explained in the 6/30/17 announcement you can view in game using /ann or here .

Lord Watzhisname was good enough to send me some information on the new beasts back in April but I have been remiss in not updating the site with it. I'll put together a new page with a summary of what he related.

The Rune Keeper can now provide a 999 rune treasure essence (EEoST). If you give him 999 gold he will take 999 ash from your character and 999 runes from your kingdom then give you the essence.

16 April 2017

I updated some information after a player on Server 1 was good enough to point out changes made since I stopped playing. Thanks for the heads up!

Many of the pages on my site are copyrighted and cannot legally reproduced without my express, written permission. It took time and effort to produce them. Anything on my site that's from someone else is acknowledged and hyperlinked back to the original source. If you notice my content being presented on another site it's NOT being used with my permission and is just plagiarism. In some cases the only change in the content is removal of my copyrght notice from the top, as if it's not there for a reason.

3 March 2017

I stopped playing RWK some years ago but still log in occasionally to check for messages. I also noted that my web site had been cloned elsewhere on the web by people who didn't bother to ask permission or cite that the content is not theirs. I'm not updating my site but want it to be online so my copyright is clearly visible in the public domain.

15 March 2014

It's been a long time since my last update and for the past several years I have only been logging in to check for private messages.

Thank you all for your help

In retrospect, I'm amazed how long RWK has lasted. I started playing in late 2000 when the first version was offered by Glitchless as a temporary entertainment while they finished getting Dawn ready for testing. As it turned out, Dawn never got to the alpha stage but RWK is still going all these years later. I never would have expected that much longevity back at the start. It's been a lot of fun and I thank those players who helped make the game enjoyable over the years. I also want to thank Jeff Friedman (a.k.a. GOD) for developing the game and running it.

17 September 2011

Happy Belated Birthday to RWK, which had its tenth anniversary on 9 September. During the first few years of the game Glitchless celebrated the event by introducing new features, but in more recent years the anniversary has gradually faded away. I thought something might happen for the 10th since it's a milestone but it never even got a mention in the Announcements . I guess that's emblematic of the game's current status at Glitchless. I had been wondering if the company would even use the anniversary to put the game to rest, but things just keep rolling along unchanged.

## Crafted Items

Crafting costs and any stat boosts are listed in the crafting tables section.

## Relics

All relics are explained on the help site , and I have also made my own version of that table with some additional information.

## RWK Information

The Official RWK help site at http://www.racewarkingdoms.com/help/

Cyril's site at http://www.angelfire.com/rpg2/rwk4/

pages.title: RWK Glossary
pages.text:
## The Language Of Race War Kingdoms

Copyright 2005 - 2026 by jimcav.com, all rights reserved

Use of this content without permission of jimcav.com is a violation of copyright.

Reproduction of the material on this site, in whole or in part, for use on another public location without the express written permission of the author is forbidden.

Hyperlinks to any page on this site are allowed without restriction.

File last updated 17 May 2026

Return to home

Term | Meaning | Type |

9x9
9x9x2 | Shorthand for doing 999,999,999 damage (nine 9�s hence 9x9) to an enemy when attacking it This is the max damage a weapon or spell can deliver When you have two weapons or spells each do 9x9 damage it�s referred to as 9x9x2 (just under 2bil total damage). |
gameplay |

/BB | Beast Bane
Quest item, purchased for $100 or available from the Ash Keeper for 100,000 ash , Using the /bb command instantly teleports you to a location one kingdom away from the location of the most recent beast . You need to move that last kingdom manually. Works for all beasts. | quest |

bnb | Beast Noobane
Quest item,random drop found anywhere you can use from level 50 and up.The /bn command instantly teleports you to a location one kingdom away from the location of the most recent Sur a href="http://www.jimcav.com/beasts.htm">beast .You need to move that last kingdom manually. |
quest |

/q |
Quickness
Formerly awarded to Acumen winners, no longer being awarded Using the /q command instantly teleports you to a location one kingdom away from the location of the most recent beast
You need to move that last kingdom manually Works for most, but not all, beasts . |
quest |

AA | Ancient Alchemar
A special beast that can appear randomly on any plane except Sur, you should have an Scepter of Annulment (SoA) to fight them, you need to have both a Scroll of Forbidden Rights and a Beast Bane to attack them Without those two quest items, you will get an error message when you try to attack one. | Beast , gameplay |

AB |
Attacker's Balance
A random quest drop that can greatly enhance a player's damage potential. | quest |

Access | The ability to leave the Surface and access the other planes in the game. In total there are 6 separate planes stacked one atop the other, in order from bottom to top they are: The Forge, Hell, Dungeon, Surface, Sky and Heaven. | gameplay |

Account Key | A secondary password providing extra security that you should set once you log into your character Use the �actions� menu, �options�, �change account key� and create a key for yourself (you create the key, it�s not assigned to you) You will need this key to recover your login password if you ever forget it, and I suggest you write down BOTH passwords, which character they are for, and store it in a safe place that you will remember when you need it Do not use the same password for both your login and account key, it�s poor security. And keep in mind that you do not control the account until you control BOTH passwords. | gameplay |

Accurate Spell | Compared to normal spells, Accurate double your Cnc | items |

Acumen |
The Acumen Inquest is a monthly tournament where players duel each other for prizes Restricted to the top 128 players torelog during a roll call at the start of the acumen. All participants win some ash, the overall winner wins game credit. | Gameplay |

AD | armor defense, more AD means you take less damage when attacked | items |

alch | Short for �alchemize� which basically allows you to convert runes into gold Players with a Scepter of Unending Repulsion or better can type /alch and convert 1rune into 1 billion gold, other players can all use the /na command (newbiealch) to convert 1 rune into 999,999,999 gold Players with a Harbinger�s Scepter of Oppression can alch 2 runes at a time and can do it from distant kingdoms. This method to basically sell runes is handy for using kingdoms as gold storage or to convert poker rune winnings into gold. | gameplay |

Allegiance | Allegiance relic, raises Kingmanship skill by 5 | relics |

"An abomination fails to take flight" | A yellow system message that appears when a Dragonling Zombie beast spawns on Sur | Beast |

Angel's Tears |
Tears of the Fallen relic, 50% chance of being saved from death for 1stTotF equipped, 10% for each one equipped thereafter You make one by giving a super relic to the Pub Keeper (you lose the super relic in the process) |
relics |

annul | Annulment relic, Cancels two of enemies relics/enchantments | relics |

Apex | The Apex relic, Doubles leveling speed but also doubles your delay factor (not stackable, beast drop, crafted, or obtained from the Hell Hermit for 100 runes, pm the Hermit) | relics |

APoS | Archer's Pouch of Secrecy, a quest item | quest |

approbation | Approbations are relics you can see your choices for approbation by using the �Actions� menu, �Options�, �Preferred Approbation� This setting has two functions One is when you use the sky hermits to enchant spells, weapons, shields, bows or arrows.

Your preferred approbation is the relic they will add to the item The second use is when you kill certain beasts

You will get your preferred approbation attached directly to your character's body parts You can have a total of up to 10approbations+blessings added this way Approbations will replace blessings, but blessings will not replace approbations Approbations do not take up any inventory space, they are always equipped, and they do not show in your inventory list You can see how many approbations you have by setting your relic display to verbose (actions menu, options, relic display) and then attacking something Read how the relics fire and the ones that are on body parts instead of equipment are approbations or blessings

You can also enhance them by adding Unborn Torment or Dragon Eater elements to them (see the quests page) Not all beasts give approbations, including the Unborn Torments, Goblin King, Thief and Miner Some that do give approbations include Crucified Corpse, Darkest Widow,Eclyptic Hell Angel, Rogue Goblin, Lord Alchemar. | gameplay, quest |

Ash | Game slang for any useless item with a relic attached, when destroyed these items give 1 gold and 1 ash. | gameplay |

Ash | Destroy 1 item with a relic and you get 1 ash, type /ash to see how much you have Ash is used is to summon beasts, put devoids on D*D relics , make a Sanction of Serenity or make treasure elements. Large amounts of ash (20k to 100k) can get you quest upgrades like aqualungs, dun and sky access, SP, etc You can't sell or trade ash itself, you trade the drops that are used to make ash Players who buy or sell ash in auction actually mean drops. You need access to hell and Templar to use ash to summon beasts . | gameplay |

ash buyer | player buying drops to convert into ash | gameplay |

Ash Collector | an NPC located at 141,Hell,174 who is used to summon beasts . Pay him a visit, give him a gold piece and have a little chat to begin his dialog, you will need all planes access and the Templar upgrade to reach him. | Non Player Character ( NPC ) |

Ash Keeper |
an NPC at 150,Sur,150 who can take your ash and provide quest items : ocean bubble (20,000 ash), Sky access , Dungeon access , Scepter of Annulment , Templar upgrade (50,000 ash each), Skill Pontificator or Beast Bane (100,000 ash each). |
Non Player Character ( NPC ) |

Ash Lottery | A daily contest you are automatically entered into on reaching level 5 Each day a winner is randomly chosen by the server and wins 10,000 ash Everyone wins a small amount, but less than 100 ash unless you get the jackpot.. |

Gameplay |

Ashen Rocks | Random drops that begin with a white ashen rock As you continue playing it transforms into a grey ashen rock and finally a black ashen rock Each rocks will give a bonus, you choose whether it�s in ash or great treasures , when you either spend $50 or more on the game or use the Ash Keeper for a 50,000 or 100,000 ash upgrade. The payouts for each Rock vary randomly within a range that depends on the Rock color:
White
� 4,000 to 6,000 ash or 1 to 2 EEoGT's
Grey
� 6,000 to 8,000 ash or 2 to 3 EEoGT's
Black
- Black Rocks give 8,000 to 10,000 ash or 3 to 4 EEoGT's | Gameplay |

asher | Someone paid to log into another person's character and collect drops This is against the rules of the game (see the 7/5/2005 announcement ) and can get both players banned. | gameplay |

Assail | An ability that comes with the Scepter of Harnessed Hatred and its upgrades If you have the ability to attack 2 or 3 kingdoms at once and the first kingdom in your path is an enemy kingdom and you own the second kingdom in your path then you will do 10 times normal damage to the first kingdom. | Gameplay quest |

Backpack | Quest item requiring Hell access to obtain, lets you store 75 items instead of 50 on your character. | quest |

base |
An item's "base" is what that item (weapon, spell, armor, etc.) costs in pure form if you buy it from the store (actions menu, buy) So, a Rusty Dagger has a base of 10 gold, aRustlessLifeceaser (RLC) a base of 1 billion gold. |
items |

/bb |
Beastbane quest item, available by purchase for $100 or from the Ash Keeper for 100,000 ash . |
quest |

BB |
Blood Bath relic, Lowers enemy health by 60% OR by 60% of your durability, whichever is lower. |
relics |

beast | Special creatures that can drop special items, and are usually much harder to kill than normal ones Most beasts have 2bilDur, high defensive skill, and require up to 13 annuls to fight, or an SoA. Many give approbations and they can drop the best items in the game. |
Beasts , gameplay |

beetle |
Polymorphic
Beetle , a special beast that can appear randomly on any plane except Sur, you need an
SoA or 8 annuls to fight them. |
beast |

beg |
begging is asking for free items or gold, it's against the rules , and can get you muted or banned. |
gameplay |

Bellows alongside the Mine Keeper | Part of the system messages (yellow text) for a few quests: [Playername] bellows alongside the Mine Keeper...All shall tremble before him� shows when a player gets a Scepter of Unending Repulsion [Playername]bellows alongside the Mine Keeper...For he now commands the power of true oppression!� shows when a player gets a Harbinger�s Scepter of Oppression | quest |

besiege | An ability that comes with the Scepter of Unending Repulsion and its upgrades. If you have the ability to attack 3 kingdoms at once and the first kingdom in your path is an enemy kingdom and you own the second and third kingdom in your path then you will do 25 times normal damage to the first kingdom. | Gameplay, quest |

Bez ,bezzler | Short for embezzle or embezzler Players with a pure leather of delegation (LoD) relic can use it to help kings with a scepter of delegation embezzle the gold from their kingdom treasuries The embezzler usually gets paid a percentage of what he embezzles. | ameplay |

blessing | Blessings are relics you can see your choices for blessing by using the �Actions� menu, �Options�, �Preferred Blessing� This setting has two functions One is when you use the Dungeon hermits to enchant spells, weapons, shields, bows or arrows Your preferred blessing is the relic they will add to the item The second use is when you kill a Polymorphic Beetle beast You will get your preferred blessing attached directly to your character's body parts You can have a total of up to 10blessings+approbations added this way Approbations will replace blessings, but blessings will not replace approbations Blessings do not take up any inventory space, they are always equipped, and they do not show in your inventory list You can see how many blessings you have by setting your relic display to verbose (actions menu, options, relic display) and then attacking something Read how the relics fire and the ones that are on body parts instead of equipment are approbations or blessings. | Gameplay |

blood | Essence of Blood quest item, drops off Ice LordAlchemar beasts | quest |

BP

Blood Pinch A relic that steals health from your enemy in the amount of 20% of your durability.

Available from the in-game Actions>Buy>relics menu, player craftable and a common relic on drops. |
relics |

BS | Brain Swell relic, Doubles your Intelligence (only dropped off beasts) | relics |

BT | Blood Tyrant, higher level vampire You become a BT if you are a vamp with 67% of your base stats inDur This requires you to reach the level cap and transfer some stats, you can�t get 67% intoDur while leveling | gameplay |

burn | destroy an item using the Actions menu, pull down to destroy This is used to eliminate items with relics, drops, and in the process you get 1 gold and 1 ash Also used to destroy high level pure relics, like voidance, in exchange for 1bil gold but no ash. | gameplay |

Burns the flesh of the living |

System message (yellow text) �[Playername] burns the flesh of the living for the power of the dead� when
a player uses the Ash Collector to add a Devoidance relic to a D*D relic and create a D*Devoid relic. |

relics |

cap | Highest you can reach in the game, there are caps on level , skills, ash, etc When used as a verb, as in �Hey, I capped this month� it means to have reached the level cap. | gameplay |

cara | The Calling of Cara relic | relics |

cassius | The Calling of Cassius relic | relics |

causes all his kingdom walls to solidify | System message (yellow text) �[Playername] causes all his kingdom walls to solidify and his attackers become wrought with fear` is displayed when a player triggers an Essence Element of Stone (by trading it to the Quake Keeper) to increase the defenses of his kingdoms for whatever remains of one game hour (compliments of The Raven Reborn) | quest |

Causes the ground to shake | A system message �[Player] causes the ground to shake as his enemies fall to their knees and his troops fight with fervor.� = dropped an essence element ofTecton, an item for waging war� shows in yellow text when a player uses an Essence Element ofTecton to attack a kingdom. | gameplay |

Causes the oceans to boil | A system message �[Player] causes the oceans to boil red with blood, finding new and mysterious powers� appears when a player displays when someone upgrades a DDD relic to a D*D using a dark essence . | relics |

CC | Crucified Corpse , a special beast that can appear randomly on any plane except Sur, you need at least 1 annul to fight them. | Beast , gameplay |

CER | Caster's Eternal Revenge relic, it is an upgraded CR relic | relics |

Chained Libertine | NPC located at 69,Sur,69, she's involved in some quests You can pm using �/m Chained Libertine: message� | NPC |

chainkill | Repeatedly killing a player, ideally as quickly as he can revive This can prevent the player being killed from do anything in the game other than chat since you can't fight or move when deadChainkilling is one way players show their disapproval of someone. | gameplay |

chance | Using the /chance command, for players who have a Captain�s Staff of Valor (CSoV, quest item) and at least one Essence Element of Treasure (EEoT) Each time you use /chance the kingdom you are in at the time gains 10 runes (the good part) while each use also has a 20% chance of destroying anEEoT (worth 50bil gold, the bad part) The gain and chance for loss balance out, so over time the odds predict you will break even It�s a convenient way to quickly rune up kingdoms, provided you have enough treasure elements and can afford to lose some in the process. | gameplay |

A Citizen hands over a Devil's Deliverance to a very worthy recipient | A player used 250,000 ash to get a Devil�s Deliverance relic from the Sky Citizen | quests |

A Citizen rolls a xx | A player is trying to get a Sash of the Blood Rogue , each roll costs 250bil and the number wanted is 10 | quests |

class | Basically, your character�s fighting style The game has several different classes to play, each needs different stats and will use different items The choices are two types each of Fighter and Spellcaster , Vampire , Archer , Monk , and Theurgist A Hybrid has some characteristics for more than one class (I don�t recommend that approach) | classes |

clicker | Someone paid to log into another person's character and make kills to gain levels. This is against the rules of the game (see the 7/5/2005 announcement ) and can get both players banned. | gameplay |

The clouds darken as
ash fills the sky | A system message (yellow text) seen by all players when someone converts an Essence Element of Ash into 50,000 ash on his character. | quest |

Combines the powers of many into one | The system message (yellow text) �[Playername] combines the
powers of many into one� means a player completed the quest for an Omega Sanction | quest |

commands powers beyond that of known gems | System message (yellow test) "[Playername] commands powers beyond that of known gems" = A player has upgraded an equipped gem to rank 10 or higher (thanks to Kathstandsalone and Mav73 for that information). | quest |

Commands the power of Dragon Shards | System message (yellow text) �[Playername] Commands the power of Dragon Shards` = someone activated a Dragon Shard element (compliments of The Raven Reborn) | quest |

commands the power of a theurgal god. | System message (yellow text) �[Playername] commands the power of a theurgal god` = someone obtained the Theurgist`s Staff of Domination (compliments Driknar S1) | quest |

Consumed by Dark Light | System message (yellow text) "[Playername] is consumed by dark light..." = someone found a Dark Essence , a very rare drop | quest |

corruption | In RWK, corruption is when the amount of interest earned by your kingdom treasury is reduced, displayed as theprecentage of reduction The message you get looks like this:
�Your
treasury atxxx,Yyy,xxx has gained 7,262,437 interest in the last 16 hours. 89% lost to corruption. Total: 680,826,368�
Corruption
is triggered by owning more than1,000 kingdoms This effect was added on 7/20/2006 and modified on 30 May 2007, see the announcements
After you own more than 1,000 kingdoms, your interest loss will become greater as you add more kingdoms Similar to corruption was over-runing , which started in any kingdom having more than 5 runes Overruning was eliminated on 9 September 2007 so is no longer a factor in the game
For historical interest, how it worked is explained in several announcements from 31 Mat to 3 June 2007 and the values are shown here . | gameplay |

CR | Caster's Revenge relic, Calling of Cara + 50% concentration boost + 50% intelligence boost | relics |

creature stats | You can find the stats for any normal creature by using the "Kingdom" menu, expand it to "Guard" and see what the monster in question costs That is the same as all its stats, and the base value of all items it drops | gameplay |

Crystal | 1. Crystal of Lars , a quest item or
2. Crystalline items (armor,weps, spells), the third best quality available in the game Crystal items are beast drop or by upgrading earthen items with ash and the Heaven Citizen | quest |

D*D | Upgraded DDD relics | relics |

D*Dv | Any of the various D*D relics that has been upgraded by the Ash Collector with the addition of a Devoid . | relics |

DAoD | Double Axe of Durability, 2.2bil base weapon that doubles durability | items |

Dark Essence (DE) | Quest items that are rare, random drops and can also be made by trading super relics to the Puddle Keeper (who may just take the Super and give nothing in return) Dark Essences are used to upgrade DDD relics to various D*D types.

When one drops all players see a system message (yellow text) "PLAYER is consumed by dark light" (thanks to Alundra Mischef and Seiyakou for sharing that information). | relics |

DCC | Durability Clarified Creation armor, bow or arrow | items |

DD | Devil's Deliverance relic It is a Denial of the Believer + 50% boost to all stats + 10 Death Spikes + **Double Defense + Voidance + Annulment + Doubles your damage output | relics |

DDD | Devil's Deleterious Deliverance relic, Upgraded DD relic | relics |

DDLD | Demonic armor items, Durability Devouring Lifeless Demise | items |

DE |

Dragon Eater , a high level beast | gameplay |

Demonic , demo | Fourth best quality items in the game Beast drop crcraftable for 28 runes and a palace element. | items |

Devoid | Devoidance relic, Each yields a 10% chance to void all enemy enchantments + Confusion + 10%mesmerization resistance. Only dropped off beasts . |
relics |

DH | Dexterous Hoist relic, Boosts dexterity by 60% but can be annulled | relics |

DotB | Denial of the Believer relic, Calling of Cara + lowers enemy health by 90% OR by 90% of your durability, whichever is lower | relics |

DPP | Durability Protectant Prevailation armor, costs 1 billion gold and 24 runes to craft and boosts Dur by 21%,Str and Ntl by 20%. | items |

Dragon Eater | Any of three types of beast , that drop three different quest items , Dragon Shards, Flames and Storm which are upgrades to Unborn Torment elements . | Beast , quest |

Dragon Wizard | Another game by Glitchless, very simple and reminiscent of something from an old Atari console Primarily of interest to very new player, Dragon Wizard points can be converted into RWK gold. This can be done by players of any level, but the amounts earned will likely only appeal to new players. | gameplay |

DRC | Depending on who you talk to, it's either the DD Relic Combo or the Double Rune Combo A player with Devil's Opulent Deliverance , Devil's Warring Deliverance , Devil's Skillful Deliverance , and Devil's Accelerated Deliverance equipped doubles the effectiveness of all your kingdom's runes | relics |

Drives his Harbinger`s Scepter of Oppression into the beetle's
skull | System message (yellow text) �[Playername]
Wierdone drives his Harbinger`s Scepter of Oppression into the beetle's
skull and it begins to glow and change form� displays when someone upgrades a Harbinger`sScepter of Oppression to a Harbinger`s
Scepter of Delegation by killing a Polymorphic Beetle . |
quest |

drop | any item obtained by killing a game critter or from other in-game activity, such as moving around the map | in game activity |

DS | Death Spike relic, 1 milunannullable damage | relic |

Dungeon | One of the 5 planes in RWK, Dungeon is just below Surface and above Hell Access to Dun requires a Lava Splicer , Transcendental Sanction , Omega Sanction , or Trial Access You get 2x Surface gold in Dungeon and it�s needed for several quests . | gameplay |

Dungeon Hermit |
any of 4 NPC's in Dungeon who can add a blessing to any spell, weapon, shield, bow or arrow for 1bil gold Each hermit chants a different item slot, so you want to visit the correct one First spell 0,Dun,0; second spell 299,Dun,0; first weapon 0,Dun,299; second weapon 299,Dun,299 You can pm using �/m Dungeon Hermit: your message here� | NPC |

Dur | Durability armor, it adds 15% to yourDur stat and 15% more armor defense | items |

DW |
Darkest Widow , a special beast that
can appear randomly on any plane except Sur, you need anSoA or 3 annuls to fight them, plus you must have a RDADMSlessonbook . |
Beast , gameplay |

earthen |

Third best quality items in the game, same as tectonic Beast drop
or by upgrading Demonic items with ash and the Heaven Citizen | items |

ED | Encephalon Decay relic, 2 milunannullable damage | relics |

EEoA |
Essence Element of Ash, an item that can be converted into 50,000 ash These are available for $50 fromGlitchless and are used as prizes for winners of the monthly Acumen | items |

EEoGT | Essence Element of Great Treasure , tradable item that stores 250 runes Obtained from the Rune Keeper for 2.5 mil gold and 250 ash, or can be crafted with very high tradeskills. To convert runes to anEEoGT, use the command �/add Rune Keeper� to put that NPC onto your trade list Then use the actions menu, give gold, to give him 2.5 million gold He takes the gold and 250 ash, gives you 1EEoGT To convert the treasure back to runes simply trade it to the Rune Keeper. | quest |

EEoT | Essence Element of Treasure , tradable item that stores 50 runes Obtained from the Rune Keeper for 1 mil gold and 50 ash, or can be crafted with very hightradeskills. To convert runes to anEEoT, use the command �/add Rune Keeper� to put that NPC onto your trade list Then use the actions menu, give gold, to give him 1 million gold He takes the gold and 50 ash, gives you 1EEoT. To convert the treasure back to runes simply trade it to the Rune Keeper. | quest |

EHA |
Eclyptic Hell Angel , a special beast
that can appear randomly on any plane except Sur. You need anSoA or 12 or 13 annuls to fight them These drop theTradeskill Manifesto (TSM) |
Beast , quest |

embezzle |

The
process in RWL where gold is removed from a kingdom treasury (Trs) If you are the king you just use the Kingdom menu, embezzle to choose how much gold to remove from the kingdom where you are located If you are embezzling for another player who has a scepter
of delegation you will need a pure leather of delegation (LoD) relic in your inventory The king you embezzle for will set some of his kingdoms to receive embezzled gold You then move through his kingdoms using the /pe command in each one to send gold from the location you are in to the one set to receive embezzled gold The embezzler never gets to keep any of the embezzled gold, he or she needs to be paid in a totally separate process.

So,
if 150,Sur,150 is set by its owner to receive gold and you are located in another kingdom at 66,Hell,66 owned by that same king, you would type the command /pe 150,Sur,150 to send gold from the 66.Hell,66Trs to150,Sur,150 You then repeat this command in every kingdom you are embezzling until you are either finished, or the receiving kingdom is full (999 runes) at which point you would need to change the destination to another kingdom able to receive more gold. |

gameplay |

Slow vamping | A technique where you fight a creature using relics and intentionally do very little damage each attack so it lives as long as possible Each time you kill a critter you lose some time clicking on the buttons to create a new enemy to fight It's faster to attack the same thing multiple times since there is no delay caused by selecting a new target between attacks Some players like to slow vamp when they are focused on skills or when making the final 10 levels to the cap. | gameplay |

Second Soft Cap | Players with an SoS reach this point 10 levels below the hard cap. Completing the last 10 levels requires 100 kills per training, or at least 100 attacks doing enough damage, AND you must have your skills set to 0%. If you put any experience into skills you will not train or gain any more levels. Just remember to reset your skills after reaching the new hard cap. | gameplay |

Soft cap | The point where you need 3x as many kills to train your stats. Withouit having an SoS your maximum level is 1,000 and begins at level if you do have an SoS THE SOFT CAP BEGINS 500 levels below the hard cap (ultimate maximum attainable level) that month and lasts until you are 10 levels below the hard cap. The last 10 levels for players with SoS is a sort of upper soft cap where it takes 100 kills to train stats. With no upgrades and playing on Surface it will take 25 kills for each training at the soft cap (courtesy of Belfegor on S2), more if you put experience into skilling. | gameplay |
